text.title: PM Tools Overview Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the PM Tools Overview artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: requirements lack moscow + evidence; only 1 requirement (need >=5); no candidates (need 3-10); empty shortlist (need 2-3); no decision_owner.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
